caption: In a simulation training environment, a person wearing a dark jacket, glasses, and a white face mask observes a medical monitor. The top frames focus on the screen, which displays a laparoscopic view of surgical tools manipulating tissue. A small pink female silhouette icon and the text "Day 4" appear in the lower left, while a graphic of books and the text "Sim Week" are in the lower right. As the scene shifts to the bottom frames, the camera pulls back to reveal a wider view of the room. The observer stands next to another person wearing a white coat and a face mask, who is actively using laparoscopic instruments on a training mannequin. The background includes a medical supply wall with various bins and organizers, and a second monitor showing a pinkish interior view. The text "Day 4" and "Sim Week" remain visible on the screen.
